verdict.reason: The daily inputs follow mutable upstream branches without input checksums or an output manifest. Missing generated files are accepted by the Bazel target.

inputs.name: merge-ut-dictionaries
inputs.fetch: git clone --depth 1 followed by branch pull

inputs.name: koyasi-syntax-guard
inputs.fetch: generated from the fixed checkout and Mozc OSS dictionary
inputs.checksum_status: observed output hash recorded; rebuilt mozc.data not verified

offline_syntax_guard.quality_measurement: not run: compiling the generated guard into mozc.data requires executing third-party Bazel build logic outside the restricted sandbox

comparison_variants.dictionary: Mozc OSS plus offline syntax guard

must_pin: immutable URL or commit and SHA-256 for every direct input
runner image and generator toolchain versions
every generated file hash, line count, and byte count
required_lock.release_behavior: fail closed on a missing or mismatched generated input; do not use allow_empty for the daily release profile

license_gates: Resolve redistribution terms for each merge-ut component rather than relying on the aggregate Combined label.
Review the web-derived nico/pixiv data separately from its MIT-licensed importer code.
Carry the Apache-2.0 attribution and any required notice for personal-name data.
Bundle dictionary-specific notices in the shipped package.
